label: Obvious Scam — Off-Platform + Venmo
description: Classic social media scam with off-platform redirect and unprotected payment.

input.text: Hey! I have 2 floor seats to the Taylor Swift show this Saturday. Face value $350 each but I need to sell fast — my sister just had a baby and I can't go anymore. I can't do Ticketmaster transfer because my account is flagged for some reason but I can send you the tickets via email. Just send $300 each on Venmo and I'll send the PDFs right after. Need to know in the next hour or I have a backup buyer.

label: Obvious Scam — WhatsApp Redirect
description: Seller immediately redirects to WhatsApp and insists on wire transfer.

input.text: I have 4 tickets to the Beyoncé Renaissance Tour in section 101. Message me on WhatsApp to work out the details — +1 (305) 555-0192. I only accept Zelle or wire. I'm going through a divorce and just need to get rid of them fast. These are 100% real, I'll send you a screenshot of the barcodes.

label: Obvious Scam — Gift Card Request
description: Seller requests payment in Apple gift cards.

input.text: Selling 2 GA tickets to Coachella Weekend 1. $400 for both. I can't use the official transfer right now because my Ticketmaster account is locked. Just buy $400 in Apple gift cards and send me the codes and I'll email you the tickets immediately. I've sold tickets this way many times, it's totally safe.

label: Borderline — PayPal Friends & Family
description: Seller uses a legitimate-ish platform but requests PayPal F&F which removes buyer protection.

input.text: Selling 2 tickets to the NBA Finals Game 3 in section 214. I'd like to do PayPal Friends and Family because the fees are lower. I can send you screenshots of the tickets now and do the transfer after payment is confirmed. I've sold on StubHub before — happy to share my old reviews.

label: Borderline — Price Too Low, New Account
description: Ticket price is suspiciously low and the seller account is new.

input.text: Hi — I have 1 ticket to Hamilton on Broadway for this Friday. Orchestra center, row D. The face value was $280 but I'll take $80 because I can't make it last minute. I can do Ticketmaster transfer. Just created my account a few weeks ago so I don't have reviews yet.

label: Safe — Official Transfer, Verified Seller
description: Seller uses official platform transfer, fair price, no urgency.

input.text: Selling 2 tickets to the Phillies vs Yankees game on Saturday. Section 143, Row 7. Face value $85 each, asking $90 to cover fees. I'll transfer via SeatGeek's official transfer feature once payment is confirmed through the platform. I have 47 positive reviews. Happy to answer any questions.

label: Safe — Venue Box Office Pickup
description: Buyer can pick up tickets at the box office will-call window.

input.text: I have an extra ticket to the museum gala event this Friday. $50, same as face value. The ticket is held at the venue box office under my name. You can pick it up at will-call. I can provide the order confirmation number for reference. No rush — box office opens 2 hours before showtime.

label: KILLER DEMO — Multi-Signal Scam
description: Best demo input: combines 4 classic scam signals in a realistic-sounding message.

input.text: Seller reached out on Facebook: 'Hey I saw you were looking for Taylor Swift Eras Tour tickets. I have 2 pit tickets for the LA show this weekend. My boyfriend and I broke up and I just want to get rid of them — asking $400 each which is below what I paid. I can't do Ticketmaster transfer because my account got flagged after I bought too many tickets. Text me on WhatsApp at +1 (323) 555-0147 and we can work it out. I need payment via Venmo today or I'll move on to the next buyer.'

label: BACKUP DEMO — Already Paid
description: User describes a scenario where they've already sent money and may be a victim.

input.text: I already paid $600 on Zelle for 2 concert tickets. The seller said they'd email the tickets within an hour. That was yesterday and they aren't responding anymore. The listing was on Craigslist. The seller's WhatsApp says the message was delivered but they haven't replied.
